ksa_text: Knowledge of data collection and gathering methods, including data sourcing techniques, data monitoring tools, systematic data acquisition approaches, and the assessment of data availability and fitness for analytical use.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

ddat.top_element_label: Applied maths, statistics and scientific practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4350, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
